free_text: The Florida State University Super FN
Tandem Van de Graaff Accelerator was used for these
counters (E) contained in a scattering chamber which
permitted the counters to be cooled to -10deg were
used to detect the reaction products.
The absolute cross section was determined in the Be
study by normalizing the a-particle elastic scattering
yield at the lab energy of 18 MeV and c.m. angle of
85.6deg to the data of Taylor et al.
